Subject: Inquiry Regarding Access to Medical Records – [Father’s Full Name] – DOB: [Date of Birth]

Dear Patient Records Department,

I am writing to inquire about the proper procedures for obtaining copies of medical records for my father, [Father’s Full Name], from your facility. Specifically, we are interested in retrieving records dated back to 2002.

As my father resides outside of the immediate vicinity of the clinic/hospital, we are looking into the administrative process required to secure these documents. Could you please provide information regarding the necessary forms, identification requirements, and any applicable fees associated with this retrieval?

If there are specific protocols regarding record retention for files of that age, please advise as well. I am prepared to execute any necessary consent documentation required to authorize access under my authority as his [your relationship, e.g., son/daughter].

Please let me know what the next steps would be. You may reach me at [Your Phone Number] or via email at [Your Email Address].

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Relationship to Patient]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Access to Medical Records – [Father’s Full Name] – DOB: [Date of Birth]

Dear Patient Records Department,

I am writing to inquire about the proper procedures for obtaining copies of medical records for my father, [Father’s Full Name], from your facility. Specifically, we are interested in retrieving records dated back to 2002.

As my father resides outside of the immediate vicinity of the clinic/hospital, we are looking into the administrative process required to secure these documents. Could you please provide information regarding the necessary forms, identification requirements, and any applicable fees associated with this retrieval?

If there are specific protocols regarding record retention for files of that age, please advise as well. I am prepared to execute any necessary consent documentation required to authorize access under my authority as his [your relationship, e.g., son/daughter].

Please let me know what the next steps would be. You may reach me at [Your Phone Number] or via email at [Your Email Address].

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Relationship to Patient]<|im_end|>
